title: Rocket Lab (RKLB) Stock Predictions: What Investors Should Expect in 2026 and Beyond
text: The article presents an optimistic perspective on Rocket Lab's near-term and long-term prospects. As of May 2026, the stock had gained 13% year-to-date, driven by strong Q1 results and new launch contracts. Wall Street analysts maintain an average price target of $87.56, with predictions ranging up to $97.84. The article notes that analysts love this stock, issuing 17 recommendations in May, with three being Strong Buys, nine being Buys, and 5 being Holds. CoinCodex forecasts an average annualized price of $311.37 by 2030 if growth continues at its current trajectory. The article identifies three primary factors supporting the stock's potential: market rarity as few publicly traded pure-play space companies exist, business diversification moving beyond rockets into higher-margin space infrastructure, and Neutron rocket development expected for commercial launch in Q4. Despite enthusiasm, the article emphasizes that Rocket Lab remains pre-profit, urging investors to balance the hype with the reality.
